hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=j.input&&j.input.command||'';if(!cmd.includes('git commit')){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'approve'}));return;}const m=cmd.match(/PGL-\d{3}/);if(!m){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Commit message must include a story ID (e.g. PGL-031). Create the story in stories.md before committing.'}));return;}const id=m[0];try{const stories=fs.readFileSync('./stories.md','utf8');if(!stories.includes('## '+id)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:id+' not found in stories.md. Create the story (## '+id+') before committing.'}));return;}process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'approve'}));}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Could not read stories.md: '+e.message}));}}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Hook error: '+e.message}));}});"
